discouragedProps.name: InputProps
discouragedProps.reason: MUI v5 compatibility escape hatch. Prefer slotProps.input for new code.

discouragedProps.name: inputProps
discouragedProps.reason: MUI v5 compatibility escape hatch. Prefer slotProps.htmlInput for new code.

discouragedProps.name: InputLabelProps
discouragedProps.reason: MUI v5 compatibility escape hatch. Prefer slotProps.inputLabel for new code.

discouragedProps.name: sx
discouragedProps.reason: Inherited MUI styling escape hatch. Prefer component props and theme tokens.

discouragedProps.name: style
discouragedProps.reason: Use only for local layout integration.

discouragedProps.name: className
discouragedProps.reason: Public styling escape hatch. Do not use to recreate internal HugoUIInput classes.

label.notes: Visible label for normal inputs; search inputs may use the label as placeholder.

values.success: Success status with InputStatus rendering for string extraMessage
values.error: Error status with InputStatus rendering for string extraMessage

multilineCount.notes: showCount applies to multiline inputs and uses inputProps.maxLength or the default max length.

loading.notes: Shows an end adornment loading indicator and sets aria-busy on the HTML input.

generationPolicy: Use color="success" or color="error" only when extraMessage communicates that state.
Do not hardcode border, focus, success, or error colors.
Prefer slotProps over compatibility props for new generated code.

a11yRules.rule: Provide label or an explicit aria label through html input props for generated inputs.
When required is true, the component marks the input aria-required and renders a visual required postfix.
When color is error, the component sets aria-invalid on the HTML input.
For single-line inputs, Enter triggers the onBlur callback; multiline inputs preserve Enter for text entry.

generationRules.rule: Use value and onChange together for controlled examples.
Use extraMessage with color="success" or color="error" when displaying validation feedback.
Do not choose InputProps, inputProps, or InputLabelProps by default; they are compatibility escape hatches.

validationRules.rule: Generated code must import Input from @hugo-ui/mui.
If color is success or error, prefer a matching extraMessage.

examples.name: Basic input
examples.code: <Input id="BasicInput" label="Default input" helperText="Helper text" value="" />

color.description: Status color for validation feedback. AI-generated usage should leave this unset by default and use success or error only with matching extraMessage.

needsReviewReason: First contract version records compatibility props and selected TextField inherited props, but does not attempt to recommend every inherited MUI TextField option.
